Q_rpe 4000[W/m^3] 4000 W/m³ Metabolic heat - retinal pigment epithelium

Q_srs 0[W/m^3] 0 W/m³ Metabolic heat - subretinal space (fluid)
Q_vitreous 0[W/m^3] 0 W/m³ Metabolic heat - vitrous (fluid)
Q_cho 0[W/m^3] 0 W/m³ Metabolic heat - choroid (removed by perfusion)
T_body 310.15[K] 310.15 K Body Temperature (37 °C)
met_on 1 1 boolean activation of the metaboklic study
poly_k k_poly 0.12 W/(m·K) Thermal conductivity switch for polyimide

ht.thfluxMag sqrt(ht.thfluxx^2+ht.thfluxy^2+ht.thfluxz^2) W/m² Total enthalpy flux magnitude Domains 1–19
ht.dflux_ux up(ht.dfluxx) W/m² Conductive heat flux, x-component Boundaries 1–105
ht.dflux_uy up(ht.dfluxy) W/m² Conductive heat flux, y-component Boundaries 1–105
ht.dflux_uz up(ht.dfluxz) W/m² Conductive heat flux, z-component Boundaries 1–105
ht.dflux_dx down(ht.dfluxx) W/m² Conductive heat flux, x-component Boundaries 1–105
ht.dflux_dy down(ht.dfluxy) W/m² Conductive heat flux, y-component Boundaries 1–105
ht.dflux_dz down(ht.dfluxz) W/m² Conductive heat flux, z-component Boundaries 1–105
ht.dfluxtest_ux up(ht.dfluxtestx) W/m² Conductive heat flux, x-component Boundaries 1–105

ht.dfluxtest_dz down(ht.dfluxtestz) W/m² Conductive heat flux, z-component Boundaries 1–105
ht.rflux 0 W/m² Radiative heat flux Boundaries 1–105 + operation
ht.ncflux mean(ht.cfluxx)*ht.nxmesh+mean(ht.cfluxy)*ht.nymesh+mean(ht.cfluxz)*ht.nzmesh W/m² Normal convective heat flux Boundaries 1–105
ht.ncflux_u up(ht.cfluxx)*ht.unxmesh+up(ht.cfluxy)*ht.unymesh+up(ht.cfluxz)*ht.unzmesh W/m² Internal normal convective heat flux, upside Boundaries 1–105
ht.ncflux_d down(ht.cfluxx)*ht.dnxmesh+down(ht.cfluxy)*ht.dnymesh+down(ht.cfluxz)*ht.dnzmesh W/m² Internal normal convective heat flux, downside Boundaries 1–105
ht.ndflux 0.5*(ht.ndflux_d-ht.ndflux_u) W/m² Normal conductive heat flux Boundaries 1–105 + operation
ht.ntflux ht.ndflux+ht.ncflux W/m² Normal total heat flux Boundaries 1–105
ht.ntflux_cst ht.ndflux+ht.ncflux W/m² Normal total heat flux, constant material properties Boundaries 1–105
ht.ntflux_u ht.ndflux_u+ht.ncflux_u W/m² Internal normal total flux, upside Boundaries 1–105
ht.ntflux_cst_u ht.ndflux_u+ht.ncflux_u W/m² Internal normal total heat flux, constant material properties, upside Boundaries 1–105
ht.ntflux_d ht.ndflux_d+ht.ncflux_d W/m² Internal normal total flux, downside Boundaries 1–105
ht.ntflux_cst_d ht.ndflux_d+ht.ncflux_d W/m² Internal normal total heat flux, constant material properties, downside Boundaries 1–105
ht.nteflux mean(ht.tefluxx)*ht.nxmesh+mean(ht.tefluxy)*ht.nymesh+mean(ht.tefluxz)*ht.nzmesh-mean(ht.dfluxx)*ht.nxmesh-mean(ht.dfluxy)*ht.nymesh-mean(ht.dfluxz)*ht.nzmesh+ht.ndflux W/m² Normal total energy flux Boundaries 1–105
ht.nteflux_cst mean(ht.teflux_cstx)*ht.nxmesh+mean(ht.teflux_csty)*ht.nymesh+mean(ht.teflux_cstz)*ht.nzmesh-mean(ht.dfluxx)*ht.nxmesh-mean(ht.dfluxy)*ht.nymesh-mean(ht.dfluxz)*ht.nzmesh+ht.ndflux W/m² Normal total energy flux, constant material properties Boundaries 1–105
ht.nteflux_u up(ht.tefluxx)*ht.unxmesh+up(ht.tefluxy)*ht.unymesh+up(ht.tefluxz)*ht.unzmesh-up(ht.dfluxx)*ht.unxmesh-up(ht.dfluxy)*ht.unymesh-up(ht.dfluxz)*ht.unzmesh+ht.ndflux_u W/m² Internal normal total energy flux, upside Boundaries 1–105
ht.nteflux_cst_u up(ht.teflux_cstx)*ht.unxmesh+up(ht.teflux_csty)*ht.unymesh+up(ht.teflux_cstz)*ht.unzmesh-up(ht.dfluxx)*ht.unxmesh-up(ht.dfluxy)*ht.unymesh-up(ht.dfluxz)*ht.unzmesh+ht.ndflux_u W/m² Internal normal total energy flux, constant material properties, upside Boundaries 1–105
ht.nteflux_d down(ht.tefluxx)*ht.dnxmesh+down(ht.tefluxy)*ht.dnymesh+down(ht.tefluxz)*ht.dnzmesh-down(ht.dfluxx)*ht.dnxmesh-down(ht.dfluxy)*ht.dnymesh-down(ht.dfluxz)*ht.dnzmesh+ht.ndflux_d W/m² Internal normal total energy flux, downside Boundaries 1–105
ht.nteflux_cst_d down(ht.teflux_cstx)*ht.dnxmesh+down(ht.teflux_csty)*ht.dnymesh+down(ht.teflux_cstz)*ht.dnzmesh-down(ht.dfluxx)*ht.dnxmesh-down(ht.dfluxy)*ht.dnymesh-down(ht.dfluxz)*ht.dnzmesh+ht.ndflux_d W/m² Internal normal total energy flux, constant material properties, downside Boundaries 1–105
ht.nthflux mean(ht.thfluxx)*ht.nxmesh+mean(ht.thfluxy)*ht.nymesh+mean(ht.thfluxz)*ht.nzmesh W/m² Normal total enthalpy flux Boundaries 1–105
ht.nthflux_cst mean(ht.thflux_cstx)*ht.nxmesh+mean(ht.thflux_csty)*ht.nymesh+mean(ht.thflux_cstz)*ht.nzmesh W/m² Normal total enthalpy flux, constant material properties Boundaries 1–105
ht.nthflux_u up(ht.thfluxx)*ht.unxmesh+up(ht.thfluxy)*ht.unymesh+up(ht.thfluxz)*ht.unzmesh W/m² Internal normal total enthalpy flux, upside Boundaries 1–105
ht.nthflux_cst_u up(ht.thflux_cstx)*ht.unxmesh+up(ht.thflux_csty)*ht.unymesh+up(ht.thflux_cstz)*ht.unzmesh W/m² Internal normal total enthalpy flux, constant material properties, upside Boundaries 1–105
ht.nthflux_d down(ht.thfluxx)*ht.dnxmesh+down(ht.thfluxy)*ht.dnymesh+down(ht.thfluxz)*ht.dnzmesh W/m² Internal normal total enthalpy flux, downside Boundaries 1–105
ht.nthflux_cst_d down(ht.thflux_cstx)*ht.dnxmesh+down(ht.thflux_csty)*ht.dnymesh+down(ht.thflux_cstz)*ht.dnzmesh W/m² Internal normal total enthalpy flux, constant material properties, downside Boundaries 1–105

ht.ndflux_u -uflux_spatial(T)/up(ht.varIntSpa) W/m² Internal normal conductive heat flux, upside Boundaries 6, 9, 12, 15, 18, 21, 24, 27, 30, 42–95 + operation
ht.ndflux_d -dflux_spatial(T)/down(ht.varIntSpa) W/m² Internal normal conductive heat flux, downside Boundaries 6, 9, 12, 15, 18, 21, 24, 27, 30, 42–95 + operation
ht.ndflux_d -dflux_spatial(T)/down(ht.varIntSpa) W/m² Internal normal conductive heat flux, downside Boundaries 1–5, 7–8, 10–11, 13–14, 16–17, 19–20, 22–23, 25–26, 28–29, 31–41, 96–105 + operation
domflux.Tx ht.dfluxx*ht.d W/m² Domain flux, x-component Domains 1–19
domflux.Ty ht.dfluxy*ht.d W/m² Domain flux, y-component Domains 1–19
domflux.Tz ht.dfluxz*ht.d W/m² Domain flux, z-component Domains 1–19
ht.chiT 0 1/Pa Isothermal compressibility coefficient Domains 1–19
ht.alphap -d(ht.rho,T)/max(ht.rho,eps) 1/K Isobaric compressibility coefficient Domains 1–19
ht.DeltaH_add integrate(ht.CpInt,ht.TInt,ht.DeltaH_Tlow,T) J/kg Sensible enthalpy Domains 1–19 + operation
ht.DeltaH_add_cst ht.Cp*(T-ht.DeltaH_Tlow) J/kg Sensible enthalpy, constant material properties Domains 1–19 + operation
ht.H ht.HRef+ht.DeltaH J/kg Enthalpy Domains 1–19 + operation

ht.Ei ht.H J/kg Internal energy Domains 1–19 + operation
ht.Ei_cst ht.H_cst J/kg Internal energy, constant material properties Domains 1–19 + operation
ht.Ek 0.5*(ht.ux^2+ht.uy^2+ht.uz^2) J/kg Kinetic energy Domains 1–19 + operation
ht.dfluxx -ht.k_effxx*Tx-ht.k_effxy*Ty-ht.k_effxz*Tz W/m² Conductive heat flux, x-component Domains 1–19 + operation
ht.dfluxy -ht.k_effyx*Tx-ht.k_effyy*Ty-ht.k_effyz*Tz W/m² Conductive heat flux, y-component Domains 1–19 + operation
ht.dfluxz -ht.k_effzx*Tx-ht.k_effzy*Ty-ht.k_effzz*Tz W/m² Conductive heat flux, z-component Domains 1–19 + operation

ht.dfluxtesty -ht.k_effyx*test(Tx)-ht.k_effyy*test(Ty)-ht.k_effyz*test(Tz) W/m² Conductive heat flux, y-component Domains 1–19 + operation
ht.dfluxtestz -ht.k_effzx*test(Tx)-ht.k_effzy*test(Ty)-ht.k_effzz*test(Tz) W/m² Conductive heat flux, z-component Domains 1–19 + operation
ht.cfluxx ht.rho*ht.ux*ht.Ei W/m² Convective heat flux, x-component Domains 1–19 + operation
ht.cfluxy ht.rho*ht.uy*ht.Ei W/m² Convective heat flux, y-component Domains 1–19 + operation
ht.cfluxz ht.rho*ht.uz*ht.Ei W/m² Convective heat flux, z-component Domains 1–19 + operation
ht.tefluxx ht.dfluxx+ht.thfluxx W/m² Total energy flux, x-component Domains 1–19 + operation
ht.tefluxy ht.dfluxy+ht.thfluxy W/m² Total energy flux, y-component Domains 1–19 + operation
ht.tefluxz ht.dfluxz+ht.thfluxz W/m² Total energy flux, z-component Domains 1–19 + operation

ht.teflux_csty ht.dfluxy+ht.thflux_csty W/m² Total energy flux, constant material properties, y-component Domains 1–19 + operation

ht.thfluxx ht.rho*ht.ux*ht.H0 W/m² Total enthalpy flux, x-component Domains 1–19 + operation
ht.thfluxy ht.rho*ht.uy*ht.H0 W/m² Total enthalpy flux, y-component Domains 1–19 + operation
ht.thfluxz ht.rho*ht.uz*ht.H0 W/m² Total enthalpy flux, z-component Domains 1–19 + operation

ht.thflux_cstz ht.rho*ht.uz*ht.H0_cst W/m² Total enthalpy flux, constant material properties, z-component Domains 1–19 + operation

ht.dEi0Int ht.solid1.dEi0Int W Total accumulated energy rate Global + operation
ht.dEi0Int_cst ht.solid1.dEi0Int_cst W Total accumulated energy rate, constant material properties Global + operation
ht.Wstr ht.pA*(d(ht.ux,x)+d(ht.uy,y)+d(ht.uz,z)) W/m³ Total stress power Domains 1–19 + operation

ht.rho material.rho kg/m³ Density Domains 1–19 Meta
ht.kxx material.k11 W/(m·K) Thermal conductivity, xx-component Domains 1–19 Meta
ht.kyx material.k21 W/(m·K) Thermal conductivity, yx-component Domains 1–19 Meta
ht.kzx material.k31 W/(m·K) Thermal conductivity, zx-component Domains 1–19 Meta
ht.kxy material.k12 W/(m·K) Thermal conductivity, xy-component Domains 1–19 Meta
ht.kyy material.k22 W/(m·K) Thermal conductivity, yy-component Domains 1–19 Meta
ht.kzy material.k32 W/(m·K) Thermal conductivity, zy-component Domains 1–19 Meta
ht.kxz material.k13 W/(m·K) Thermal conductivity, xz-component Domains 1–19 Meta
ht.kyz material.k23 W/(m·K) Thermal conductivity, yz-component Domains 1–19 Meta
ht.kzz material.k33 W/(m·K) Thermal conductivity, zz-component Domains 1–19 Meta
ht.Cp material.Cp J/(kg·K) Heat capacity at constant pressure Domains 1–19 Meta
ht.solid1.pref 1[atm] Pa Reference pressure level Domains 1–19
ht.k_iso if(material.k12==0&&material.k13==0&&material.k21==0&&material.k22==material.k11&&material.k23==0&&material.k31==0&&material.k32==0&&material.k33==material.k11,material.k11,error('Failed to evaluate an isotropic value of an anisotropic tensor')) W/(m·K) Thermal conductivity, isotropic value Domains 1–19 Meta
ht.pA ht.pref Pa Absolute pressure Domains 1–19
ht.C_eff ht.rho*ht.Cp J/(m³·K) Effective volumetric heat capacity Domains 1–19
ht.cellPe 0.5*ht.rho*ht.Cp*h*sqrt(ht.ux^2+ht.uy^2+ht.uz^2)/ht.kmean 1 Cell Péclet number Domains 1–19
ht.ux 0 m/s Velocity field, x-component Domains 1–19 + operation
ht.uy 0 m/s Velocity field, y-component Domains 1–19 + operation
ht.uz 0 m/s Velocity field, z-component Domains 1–19 + operation

ec.I_sZY (spatial.invF12*(spatial.invF13*ec.I_sxx+spatial.invF23*ec.I_syx+spatial.invF33*ec.I_szx)+spatial.invF22*(spatial.invF13*ec.I_sxy+spatial.invF23*ec.I_syy+spatial.invF33*ec.I_szy)+spatial.invF32*(spatial.invF13*ec.I_sxz+spatial.invF23*ec.I_syz+spatial.invF33*ec.I_szz))*spatial.detF 1 Spatial identity matrix, material frame, ZY-component Domains 1–19

ec.unTex -0.5*ec.dnx*(real(up(ec.Dx))*real(up(ec.Ex))+real(up(ec.Dy))*real(up(ec.Ey))+real(up(ec.Dz))*real(up(ec.Ez)))+real(up(ec.Dx))*(real(up(ec.Ex))*ec.dnx+real(up(ec.Ey))*ec.dny+real(up(ec.Ez))*ec.dnz) Pa Maxwell upward electric surface stress tensor, x-component Boundaries 6, 9, 12, 15, 18, 21, 24, 27, 30, 42–95
ec.unTey -0.5*ec.dny*(real(up(ec.Dx))*real(up(ec.Ex))+real(up(ec.Dy))*real(up(ec.Ey))+real(up(ec.Dz))*real(up(ec.Ez)))+real(up(ec.Dy))*(real(up(ec.Ex))*ec.dnx+real(up(ec.Ey))*ec.dny+real(up(ec.Ez))*ec.dnz) Pa Maxwell upward electric surface stress tensor, y-component Boundaries 6, 9, 12, 15, 18, 21, 24, 27, 30, 42–95
ec.unTez -0.5*ec.dnz*(real(up(ec.Dx))*real(up(ec.Ex))+real(up(ec.Dy))*real(up(ec.Ey))+real(up(ec.Dz))*real(up(ec.Ez)))+real(up(ec.Dz))*(real(up(ec.Ex))*ec.dnx+real(up(ec.Ey))*ec.dny+real(up(ec.Ez))*ec.dnz) Pa Maxwell upward electric surface stress tensor, z-component Boundaries 6, 9, 12, 15, 18, 21, 24, 27, 30, 42–95

ec.unTey 0 Pa Maxwell upward electric surface stress tensor, y-component Boundaries 1–5, 7–8, 10–11, 13–14, 16–17, 19–20, 22–23, 25–26, 28–29, 31–41, 96–105

ec.dnTex -0.5*ec.unx*(real(down(ec.Dx))*real(down(ec.Ex))+real(down(ec.Dy))*real(down(ec.Ey))+real(down(ec.Dz))*real(down(ec.Ez)))+real(down(ec.Dx))*(real(down(ec.Ex))*ec.unx+real(down(ec.Ey))*ec.uny+real(down(ec.Ez))*ec.unz) Pa Maxwell downward electric surface stress tensor, x-component Boundaries 1–105
ec.dnTey -0.5*ec.uny*(real(down(ec.Dx))*real(down(ec.Ex))+real(down(ec.Dy))*real(down(ec.Ey))+real(down(ec.Dz))*real(down(ec.Ez)))+real(down(ec.Dy))*(real(down(ec.Ex))*ec.unx+real(down(ec.Ey))*ec.uny+real(down(ec.Ez))*ec.unz) Pa Maxwell downward electric surface stress tensor, y-component Boundaries 1–105
ec.dnTez -0.5*ec.unz*(real(down(ec.Dx))*real(down(ec.Ex))+real(down(ec.Dy))*real(down(ec.Ey))+real(down(ec.Dz))*real(down(ec.Ez)))+real(down(ec.Dz))*(real(down(ec.Ex))*ec.unx+real(down(ec.Ey))*ec.uny+real(down(ec.Ez))*ec.unz) Pa Maxwell downward electric surface stress tensor, z-component Boundaries 1–105

ec.DX epsilon0_const*ec.I_sXX*ec.EX+epsilon0_const*ec.I_sXY*ec.EY+epsilon0_const*ec.I_sXZ*ec.EZ+ec.PX+ec.PeX+ec.PhX C/m² Electric displacement field, X-component Domains 1–19
ec.DY epsilon0_const*ec.I_sYX*ec.EX+epsilon0_const*ec.I_sYY*ec.EY+epsilon0_const*ec.I_sYZ*ec.EZ+ec.PY+ec.PeY+ec.PhY C/m² Electric displacement field, Y-component Domains 1–19
ec.DZ epsilon0_const*ec.I_sZX*ec.EX+epsilon0_const*ec.I_sZY*ec.EY+epsilon0_const*ec.I_sZZ*ec.EZ+ec.PZ+ec.PeZ+ec.PhZ C/m² Electric displacement field, Z-component Domains 1–19
ec.PX epsilon0_const*(ec.chiXX*ec.EX+ec.chiXY*ec.EY+ec.chiXZ*ec.EZ) C/m² Polarization, X-component Domains 1–19 + operation
ec.PY epsilon0_const*(ec.chiYX*ec.EX+ec.chiYY*ec.EY+ec.chiYZ*ec.EZ) C/m² Polarization, Y-component Domains 1–19 + operation

ec.chiXX -1+ec.epsilonrXX 1 Electric susceptibility, XX-component Domains 1–19
ec.chiYX ec.epsilonrYX 1 Electric susceptibility, YX-component Domains 1–19

ec.chiZZ -1+ec.epsilonrZZ 1 Electric susceptibility, ZZ-component Domains 1–19
ec.Ex spatial.invF11*ec.EX+spatial.invF12*ec.EY+spatial.invF13*ec.EZ V/m Electric field, x-component Domains 1–19
